notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Jeffrey Springs picks off Alex Bregman at 1st on throw to first baseman Nick Kurtz.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki grounds into a double play, shortstop Alika Williams to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Alex Bregman out at 2nd. Seiya Suzuki out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Jeff McNeil batting, Zack Gelof picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim grounds out to first baseman Michael Busch. Alika Williams to 3rd.
